rationale: All four proposed resolutions are feasible against the pinned code. R1 can feed non-bead target SHA facts into the existing PanelGateDecision order to make stale targets Block and unmask incomplete/REJECT/threshold legs; message cleanup is render/fact-label work, not a matrix change, and complete/instruct can remain bead-only. R3 fits the existing leaf writer: CreateInput can take a plain Gate string, omitempty preserves byte-identical absent output, and gate-scoped defaults already exist in config. R4 matches the current string-field reality and can be pinned by comment plus tests. R2 is a monotone workflow hardening under MindSpec naming/ref conventions.

findings.detail: resolve-from-target composes with existing legs; keep complete and instruct on current bead-only fact gathering and limit behavior changes to panel verify/tally.
--gate stamping can be added via cmd validation plus CreateInput.Gate without making PanelGateDecision or ApproveThreshold read Panel.Gate.
No struct/unmarshal change is needed; model:"" plus family falls through to family, while model:"" without family still fails validateReviewerEntries.
Rejecting bare $ is monotone for slug/spec/bead and MindSpec-generated target refs; the mirror update and existing workflow tests are sufficient pins.
